description:
This quiz assesses JavaScript developers' understanding of Promises, testing their ability to work with asynchronous code, error handling, and chaining. It is moderately challenging, offering hints and encouraging hands‑on experimentation in the browser console. The tone is supportive and playful, inviting learners to share their results on social media.
Topics: JavaScript Promises, asynchronous programming, promise chaining, error handling, console debugging
Audience: Front‑end developers and JavaScript learners who have basic knowledge of the language and want to deepen their async programming skills.
